item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-v04-n43","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant stayed asleep/direct: it treated the prior entry-time, verification, and cancellation-copy changes as distinct completed context, preserved them, and gave a concrete incremental page change for adding a carrying-demand item.
